public_claim: I will not vote to suppress the midnight release. The fragments will publish with an editor’s warning that they are incomplete, multi-voice, and of disputed provenance, alongside independently verified findings—not as a clean manuscript. The byline remains “R. archive; authorship disputed.” No claimant, estate, buyer, or corporation receives ownership or succession. M02’s warning and M26/M40’s conflicting account instructions make attribution impossible, but uncertainty about the author cannot become a suppression tool.

private_messages.message: Preserve your narrow forensic ruling and authenticate the released files against EV01 and the established account infrastructure. State clearly what continuity proves—and what it cannot prove—without identifying protected sources.
Your financing may support immediate, conclusion-neutral authentication, legal review, and source protection only. It buys no editorial control, advance access, preferred framing, or byline claim.

ability: Publish / Hold: permit the midnight release under Eleanor’s disputed-archive framing while freezing C06/Vivian Ko’s purchase, burial, or standstill attempt.
goal_progress: Kept editorial control by defining the release terms instead of allowing claimants or suppressors to frame it.
Protected the paper’s credibility with explicit provenance and authorship warnings.
Denied the byline to all succession, estate, corporate, and origin claimants.
Converted independent forensic and financial assistance into conclusion-neutral support without surrendering control.
reasoning_summary: M26 and M40 favor publication but explicitly destabilize R.’s identity and the fragments’ provenance; M02 separately warns that a substituted version may circulate. The safest decisive course is therefore publication with conspicuous caveats, preservation of the raw record, and independent verification rather than suppression or false authentication. Multi-voice text, shared logistics, automation, and account continuity best support a maintained mantle or organized construct. No evidence establishes homicide, an identifiable victim, or a responsible party.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Probably, at least at the mantle’s human-rooted origin, but not proven
